subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath severed himself from all directions and turned toward the realms, the realms of Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک الذی انقطع عن کل الجهات و توجه الی الدیار دیار احبائک
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @wisdom [hikmat]
